{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230043204CCB0752FA930C1AEA8D"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610797520987374398","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，已经重头再来一次了，大大能不能快快点更新"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772029108,"group_id":"7574279348853672984","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个穷鬼五彩斑斓的幻想世界","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/B8pv6+a/T7OB7KUpRxH/AcFNVnkYOug63mKAU6u8O3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/643c497d686e42fd901d7ed9e4e01879~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794231&x-signature=zdu8%2FoSco02I8hBKE%2FmWbJT0CQo%3D","user_id":"2740409975710752","user_name":"白衣谢了风流花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2740409975710752","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574279348853672984","book_info":{"abstract":"双强，1v1，先婚后……非传统意义的重生，暗藏反转。
双方各怀目的靠近，女主绝非圣母。 
她曾说：“这世间，若真有的选，谁不想当个道貌岸然的好人呢？” 
起初，宿云微只想待在气运之女身边积攒功德，填补落桐渊的累累孽债。
可她万万没想到，自己竟跟着气运之女一同重生了……
呵，不愧是气运加身的女子。
只是，怎么刚刚来就成了气运之女的头号复仇对象？
那点手段全往她身上使了，刚刚来就让她被一个蠢得不能再蠢的鬼脑袋缠住。
这以后楼家的日子可还好过？
 …………
 
“你看，那是谁的头颅啊，寻不到身躯，归不得故里。”
“你听，是谁在低唱歌谣。”
 
摇啊摇，过阴桥，桥头新娘咧嘴笑。
纸衣染血，静候新郎。
 
“嘘——”
“小声些，听见棺木之中的惨叫了吗？”
“是谁家的新娘，尚未断气便被生生锁入棺中？”
“你听！”
“那片湖水之下，全是婴孩的啼哭之声……”
 在怨灵的嘶吼声中，一双大手捂着了她耳朵。
低声告诉她：“别害怕。”
是他在冰天雪地中，抱着她穿梭罡风，将她带回家。
也是他，事事为她考虑，院子里种满了她最爱的梧桐树。
清醒过来的宿云微只有一个念头：快逃，这人惦记她的功德金光。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9008becffaaf3d9faddd8159c42dbcf1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"余俚","author_id":"","book_id":"7574279348853672984","book_name":"仙侠女主误入重生文","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#702828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574279507075416600","read_count":"665","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"167474"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"78","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,古色古香,魂穿,捉鬼,强强,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9008becffaaf3d9faddd8159c42dbcf1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381800&x-signature=c507N27dX5lDC8IlPh9jg%2B3U6YI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"75205091531583","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"57"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230043204CCB0752FA930C1AEA8D"}
